title: Pagecraft
summary: A resilient document workspace proving real Lexical selection, rich-text history, and versioned autosave across network races.

journeys.title: Open a document deep link, retain keyboard focus, and flush edits through immediate navigation
Format a live contenteditable selection and restore it through undo, redo, and reload
Retain save ownership across route remounts and settle versioned autosaves out of order
Retry a rejected save and persist an offline edit after reconnection
Reject malformed editor data, recover loading, and distinguish blank and missing documents

faultScenarios.description: The fault=load query rejects one deterministic document load and then succeeds from the retry control.
The fault=save query rejects the first debounced mutation while retaining the local editor state for an explicit retry.
A slow first mutation completes after a fast second mutation, and version checks preserve the newest serialized editor state.
Browser offline state pauses autosave while keeping the visible draft, then reconnect automatically persists it.
Lexical parses untrusted serialized state at both the save and load boundaries, rejecting unknown nodes without mounting corrupt content.
